title: The Firstborns of the Firstborn
summary: “To the general assembly and church of the firstborn, which are written in heaven, and to God the Judge of all, and to the spirits of just men made perfect.” (Hebrews 12:23). The purpose of this Bible study today is to ensure that he understand the infinite value of our birthright in the Lord Jesus Christ, so we will cherish and value it. Let us proudly declare today that we are children of the firstborn of God, Jesus Christ. By this is meant that the flesh and blood of the Lord is not of earthly or human origin but has its source in God himself. This is what the Bible means when it states repeatedly that Jesus is the Son of God. “And Simon Peter answered and said, Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living God” (Matthew 16:16). If we make this declaration with understanding, the Lord will pronounce a blessing upon us, as he did Peter. Now, the Bible declares we are the children of the firstborn.
